rationale: Hard pass: this archetype is built around licensed Dragon Ball IP (Goku SSJ3, Dragon Fist), which creates immediate legal/takedown risk for a hypercasual title that has no anime aesthetic, no charged-attack mechanic, and no narrative VO style. The gold/indigo/purple palette and shounen-anime audience also clash with Push'em All's bright minimalist stickman look and broad casual all-ages audience. Only the abstract "satisfying knockout payoff" idea is transferable — rebuild the satisfaction beat around the stick expanding and shoving a red stickman crowd off the platform, and drop the IP entirely.
